reviews.comment:
Lautaro es muy gentil y atento en la atención de 22 a 6 hs deben subirle el sueldo porque se lo merece. Viva la libertad. Gracias por seguirme lauti.!!

(Translated by Google)
Lautaro is very kind and attentive, serving from 10 p.m. to 6 a.m. He should get a raise because he deserves it. Long live freedom. Thanks for following me, Lauti!

reviews.comment:
Me queda cerca, pero no lo uso seguido, fui una mañana a desayunar,  horrible,  me sentí desatendida. La cajera dejó mucho que desear, cuando pedí el baño me dijo: fíjate la chica, creo que esta limpiando...no pude entrar,  pues la " chica" se tardo demasiado, entiendo de limpieza, pero eran menos de 2 metros cuadrados a las 07am...y conozco varios Aca

(Translated by Google)
It's close to me, but I don't go there often. I went one morning for breakfast, and it was awful. I felt neglected. The cashier was terrible. When I asked to use the restroom, she said, "Look at the girl, I think she's cleaning..." I couldn't go in because the "girl" took too long. I know about cleaning, but it was less than two square meters at 7:00 a.m., and I know several places like this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmdGY2TnFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No puedo ponerle 0 estrellas porque no puedo, fui a dejar CV y la empleada del turno mañana (19/12/2024) no solo que me vio, me ignoro y siguió reponiendo, dejándome esperando y no pensando en atenderme, sino que le consulto para dejar mi cv y sin empatía, no me dejo entregárselo, diciendo que no estaban tomando gente y volvió a darse vuelta, ignorándome otra vez. Podría haber tenido empatía de agarrarlo para alguna futura búsqueda o al menos hablarme bien. Pésima la atención!

(Translated by Google)
I can't give it zero stars because I simply can't. I went to drop off my resume, and the employee on the morning shift (December 19, 2024) not only saw me but ignored me and continued restocking, leaving me waiting and not even considering helping me. When I asked her about leaving my resume, she showed no empathy and refused to let me hand it over, saying they weren't hiring and then turning away, ignoring me again. She could have at least had the decency to consider it for a future job opening or at least speak to me politely. The service was terrible!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cXNIWHZRRRAB
